details.test: Task 1: Book April museum day trip and add to cart
Task 2: Select 3-day science trip and start booking
Task 3: Compare two museum day trips and save cheaper to wishlist
Task 4: Bus hire booking - continue to payment options
Task 5: Custom city trip with 3 activities under budget - verify and save
Task 6: Add two different same-day trips for different grades to cart
Task 7: Reserve discounted late-March trip for 15 students

Task 9: Request quote for multi-day educational tour
